name: Bestway Global Holding Inc.
summary: Bestway Global Holding Inc., an investment holding company, designs, develops, manufactures, and sells a range of outdoor leisure products primarily under the BESTWAY brand in Mainland China, Europe, North America, the Asia-Pacific, and internationally. It offers portable spas and accessories; range of inflatable water sports items under the Hydro-Force brand; inflatable tubes and sleds under the H2OGO brand name; baby boats, armbands, swim vests and jackets, and kickboards for newborns and toddlers under the SwimSafe ABC and Fisher-Price brands; and above ground pools comprising inflatable top ring, steel frame, and steel wall pools, as well as swim fitness and pool accessories. The company also provides swim gears, such as goggles, diving masks, mask sets, fins, dive toys, and accessories under Hydro-Swim and Hydro-Pro brand names; recreational toys for water, grass, and indoor use; portable sleep solutions, which includes airbeds and air furniture; and outdoor camping gear, such as airbeds, backpacks, tents, sleeping bags, and accessories under Pavillo brand. In addition, it produces and sells polymer films; and engages in the investment management, as well as trades in inflatable products. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China. Bestway Global Holding Inc. is a subsidiary of Great Success Enterprises Holdings Limited.
